nasb.text: Moreover, next to him the Tekoites made repairs, but their nobles did not support the work of their masters.

esv.text: And next to them the Tekoites repaired, but their nobles would not stoop to serve their Lord.

cnv.text: 接著這一段的是由提哥亞人修築；但是他們的貴族不願肩負他們的主的工作。

ccb.text: 再下一段由提哥亚人修筑，但他们的贵族不肯做督工所分派的工作。
